title: araucaria muelleri
intro: Araucaria muelleri, also known as Hoop Pine, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree that is native to northeastern New South Wales in Australia. The resin of the Araucaria muelleri tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Araucaria muelleri include essential oils extracted from the resin, which can be used in aromatherapy and as a natural antiseptic.
